---
title: "Project Status"
---

::: {.callout-note}
Generated by `scripts/generate-project-status.py` on 2026-06-27T20:25:38.414611.
:::

## Current milestone

pre-v1-corpus-expansion-window

## Case status

| Case | Status | Current stage | Model reliability | Human reliability | Manifest docs | Raw | Text | Segmented | MIPVU | Annotated | Concordance | Analysis |
|---|---|---|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|---|
| `am-rev` | mipvu-review-complete-codex-assisted | mipvu-review-complete | absent | absent | 9 | 9 | 9 | 9 | 9 | 2 | complete | complete |
| `fr-rev` | draft-corpus-ready | mipvu-worklist-generated | absent | absent | 2 | 2 | 2 | 2 | 2 | 0 | stub | stub |
| `hitler` | mipvu-review-complete-codex-assisted | mipvu-review-complete | absent | absent | 8 | 8 | 8 | 8 | 8 | 8 | complete | complete |
| `lincoln` | mipvu-review-complete-codex-assisted | mipvu-review-complete | complete | designed | 3 | 3 | 3 | 3 | 3 | 3 | complete | complete |
| `napoleon` | mipvu-review-complete-codex-assisted | mipvu-review-complete | absent | absent | 10 | 10 | 10 | 10 | 10 | 9 | complete | complete |
| `x-case` | comparative-protocol-draft | comparative-guardrails-defined | not-applicable | not-applicable |  |  |  |  |  |  | draft | comparative-protocol-draft |

## Model-reliability warnings

- `am-rev` (absent): Multi-model reliability has not been designed for this case.
- `fr-rev` (absent): Multi-model reliability has not been designed for this case.
- `hitler` (absent): Multi-model reliability has not been designed for this case.
- `napoleon` (absent): Multi-model reliability has not been designed for this case.

## Human-reliability warnings

- `am-rev` (absent): Human reliability has not been designed for this case.
- `fr-rev` (absent): Human reliability has not been designed for this case.
- `hitler` (absent): Human reliability has not been designed for this case.
- `lincoln` (designed): Human reliability cohorts are designed; required primary coder submissions are not complete.
- `napoleon` (absent): Human reliability has not been designed for this case.

## Notes

The four original historical case corpora remain the current verified scored working corpus: rights-reviewed, acquired, normalized, segmented, verified, and JSON-valid. The pre-v1 expansion window has added fr-rev as a draft French-source corpus with manifest, raw text, normalized text, segmentation, and MIPVU worklists, but no reviewed annotations, support rating, or reliability sample yet. All four original cases have Codex-assisted first-pass MIPVU lexical decisions. Lincoln has complete model-reliability artifacts and designed human-reliability cohorts, but required human coder submissions are not complete. American Revolution, Napoleon, Hitler, and fr-rev model and human reliability workflows remain absent or incomplete. Expansion work is tracked in GitHub milestone 7 and issue #174; any additional new cases or documents require selection rationale, rights/provenance review, manifest registration, pipeline processing, annotation-forward artifacts, reliability sampling review, and an explicit expanded-corpus freeze point.
